message:
chore: gitignore .cargo/config.toml local toolchain override

An agent had written `.cargo/config.toml` with just
`[unstable]\nbindeps = true` to enable the nightly bindeps feature for
its local toolchain. That file is per-checkout state, not project
config — committing it would force `bindeps = true` on every developer
and CI runner, which we don't want.

Adding `.cargo/config.toml` (without a wildcard) so local overrides
stop showing up as untracked in `ru status` while still leaving the
door open to commit a deliberate `.cargo/config.toml` later if we
ever decide we want one project-wide.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -93,6 +93,9 @@ target_*/
 .cargo-*/
 .cargo_*/
 
+# Local toolchain override (e.g. agent-injected `[unstable] bindeps = true`)
+.cargo/config.toml
+
 # Ephemeral test binaries (generated by agents during validation)
 run_test
 tiny_test
